horoscope: It can be especially difficult to read those close to you early today, dear Aries. There can be some frustration with someone who seems to be seeing a matter too logically or, in your mind, narrowly, but the lines of communication are open, and you appreciate that. On this day of shifts, a wait-and-see approach is probably warranted. Jupiter’s direct turn today after nearly four months of retrograde motion increases your enthusiasm and joy. This shift is most evident in your emotions, home life, and personal world. The weeks ahead are excellent for gradual improvements to family life or your domestic world. It can be a time of increased happiness, warmth, comfort, and support. Home improvement projects can resume or pick up pace, and relationships with family may strengthen. You have a real and growing sense that things are getting better.

Early today, watch for overly suspicious feelings, dear Taurus, aiming to let go of matters you cannot change. With motivation levels dipping temporarily, it can take longer to get through your duties. However, the day picks up nicely as it advances. Jupiter ends its almost four-month retrograde cycle and will move in direct motion in your communications sector for the remainder of its transit (until June 30th). Your confidence in your studies or your ability to express yourself increases. More clarity is likely in your projects, communications, and personal interests in the weeks ahead. Positive word of mouth can benefit you tremendously. Studies, interviews, connections, and contacts can work in your favor. Fortunately, your enthusiasm for learning and connecting grows. Conversations open up, and faith and optimism improve as you advance. You’re more courageous about reaching out to others, or blocks to making connections lift, and this is a time for spontaneous and natural interactions. There can be a sense that you are turning a corner now, although Mercury's retrograde until the 20th can stall things a little longer.

While things can be a little tense early today, dear Gemini, aim to allow for differences in opinion and watch for exaggeration. Truly listening to other viewpoints can be rewarding. Fortunately, Jupiter ends its retrograde cycle today, boosting your confidence and joy. This shift strengthens your general outlook and stores of optimism. As it occurs in your resources sector, you have good reasons for more confidence with money, resources, and talents in the weeks ahead. Your faith in your abilities and skills increases. A money block or delay might lift. It may take a little time to get completely back on track, but the months ahead (until June 30th) favor business ventures and money-making ideas. You are more decisive about making purchases and confident about pursuing your desires. You’re also a little more faithful and courageous about growing a business. Because Jupiter rules your partnership sector, this turnaround can also boost or jumpstart a relationship.

Early today, avoid allowing anxiety and fear to undermine you, dear Cancer. Instead, aim to take solid steps to improve your current financial position, with an eye on the future. There are emotional factors involved as well, of course, and these require work. The support you receive from others is evolving, and the changes you experience are bringing you closer to facing your fears. There can be a nice feeling of moving forward as the day progresses. Jupiter changes direction today after almost four months of retrograde motion. With Jupiter still in your sign (until June 30th), you will likely notice a shift in your outlook and mood. In the weeks ahead, you’re increasingly more comfortable and confident that you have the power to make positive changes in your life. You are likely to feel freer, in general. This direct turn can refuel you with enthusiasm. Personal plans become clearer, and you follow your instincts more naturally. This week, you feel that you’re turning a corner. Your faith that things will work out if left to run their course increases.

Early today, avoid getting yourself embroiled in power games that go nowhere, dear Leo. Fortunately, the day advances with less tension. You’re in a developmental stage with Jupiter transiting your privacy sector until June 30th. You’re clearing the decks, but Jupiter has been retrograde since November, and some of your pursuits may have taken a back seat. Today, Jupiter ends its retrograde, and its direct motion gives you a stronger sense of purpose--you’re turning a corner. The months ahead are golden for the culmination of projects and introspection as you prepare for a more visible and outgoing period starting on the last day of June, when Jupiter will head into your sign for a transit that lasts about a year. Jupiter’s direct turn now improves your outlook and faith that you can put troubles behind you. Blocks can lift for projects or initiatives that have stalled.

Your manner can be on the intense side early today, dear Virgo, after which you tend to loosen up. Until then, aim to discern between feelings that come from a place of insecurity and those that come from your heart. You might feel that something is leading to a dead end, and you may want to investigate your alternatives. However, be careful not to jump into something out of current frustrations. Fortunately, there can be a significant turning point in your outlook, and your faith in a plan, dream, or cause increases. Jupiter turns direct today after nearly four months of retrograde motion, and enthusiasm will surely build for friendships or new ventures as blocks and delays lift. As these areas of your life clear up, you gain more insight into where you stand and have a stronger sense of where you’re heading. Motivation to interact, contribute, and participate will improve in the weeks ahead as you more naturally reach out to others and network. Jupiter will continue to transit your social sector until June 30th, and life can present you with excellent opportunities to enjoy, build, or form friendships. Family and home matters are likely to improve as well. You follow your instincts spontaneously as you second-guess yourself much less frequently.

While early today you could be especially sensitive, dear Libra, you could be coming at an old problem from a new angle that truly works for you, especially as the day advances. Today brings the end of Jupiter’s retrograde, which lasted for nearly four months since November. With this turnaround, you’ll feel more hope, faith, and confidence in your life direction, long-term goals, and reputation. Career prospects and outlook can also improve in the weeks ahead. You may have recently questioned whether your efforts have had much impact. However, you feel stronger and ready to take on a challenge, bringing more confidence to your work. Or, you feel more capable of handling your responsibilities and taking the lead. If a business venture or life path was blocked or lagging in recent months, you are now turning a corner. Although it can take a bit of time to get back on track, you will likely see gradual improvements in these areas.

This can be an up and down day for both physical and emotional energy, dear Scorpio. At the root of this is likely an instinctive need for change, but a simultaneous fear of it. Give others room, but don't ignore your needs either. The day advances with more clarity. With Jupiter ending its retrograde cycle today, you can feel you’re turning a corner with your outlook. Publishing or learning matters can move forward, perhaps after a period of limbo. Delays lift, or news arrives that renews your interest in and motivation for these pursuits. In recent months, while Jupiter was retrograde, you may have questioned a particular belief system or suffered from some lack of faith in your future. Now, you readily find reasons to be optimistic about where you’re heading. It’s a time for rebuilding your enthusiasm about making contact, learning new things, venturing out and about, and sharing your ideas. In fact, it's an opportunity period for these matters until June 30th.

Early today, avoid letting ego issues run amok, dear Sagittarius, particularly when it comes to an opinion or viewpoint. You may spend some time trying to draw conclusions or to get solid answers about a family, past, or home-related matter. Review matters but don't push them for the best results. Jupiter ends its retrograde cycle today, and you’ll gradually see improvements or forward motion with your intimate life or finances. You also feel more confident and on the ball in general, as Jupiter is your planetary ruler. You can feel better about dealing with tricky emotions and complicated problems. A close relationship may resume, rekindle, or heat up. Or, if you’ve been procrastinating on settling your finances, you’re getting ready to take them on. The give-and-take in a relationship improves, and there is more clarity about your feelings and a partner’s involvement. The months ahead are excellent for making empowering lifestyle changes as Jupiter continues to transit your solar eighth house until June 30th, from today onward, in direct motion.

Early today, you may need to look beyond the insistence of the messages you are receiving in order to benefit from them, dear Capricorn. There will be a need to discern between fact and fiction, and you are unlikely to be agreeing with those closest to you. Distractions are plenty now! It’s a day of shifts, so it’s better to take things as they come rather than try to push matters. After nearly four months of retrograde motion, Jupiter turns direct in your partnership sector today. This move feels refreshing and is a good sign for your close relationships or partnerships. It’s also strong for your general sense of balance! There can be more clarity, a turning of the corner, or forward movement in a relationship. You experience less fear and more joy now, and your needs from others become more apparent. You're in a better position to see the benefits of partnering as you advance. Or, there could be more helpful, happy, or pleasing people coming (or coming back) into your life.

A strong sense of pride and privacy could trip you up early today, dear Aquarius, as you might shoulder many responsibilities and avoid sharing the load. You may fear loss of respect if you reveal your vulnerabilities. Fortunately, as the day advances, your thoughts are lifted upward and outward. Jupiter turns direct after nearly four months of retrograde motion, and your enthusiasm and motivation are building for your work and health pursuits. This reversal can unblock a delayed project, or it can increase your motivation to get back on track with lifestyle changes and improve your habits and routines. Work matters pick up speed in the period ahead. You might return to projects that recently stalled, or you receive new information that lifts a block or obstacle out of your way. After reacquainting yourself with what you left behind, things pick up pace in these areas of life! You’re more confident and likely to pursue new developments in business or work.

It can be difficult to focus on any one thing early today, dear Pisces, or there can be communication and mechanical breakdowns that get in your way. Later, your spirit returns as you lift your mind above the mundane and think in bigger terms. Jupiter ends its retrograde cycle today after nearly four months of retrograde motion in your creativity sector, a move that can help lift creative blocks. More clarity or enthusiasm may come to your love life, pursuit of joy, leisure time, or creative projects in the months ahead. Faith and optimism increase! You’ll likely make more spontaneous and natural connections in the coming weeks. Your excitement or motivation surrounding love, entertainment, hobbies, and pastimes builds. Although this shift doesn’t yield instant results, you’ll gradually feel more optimistic about sharing yourself with others.
